requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (BPS ICC / PS + PNS IEC 60598)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（BPS ICC / PS + PNS IEC 60598）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（BPS ICC / PS + PNS IEC 60598）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Philippine market and covered by the lighting technical regulation must demonstrate electrical safety to the Philippine National Standard adoption of IEC 60598 (PNS IEC 60598-1 General requirements and tests, with the relevant Part 2 sections for the luminaire type). Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation and dielectric strength, creepage and clearance distances, thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and wiring terminals — evaluated for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply. Safety is demonstrated within the BPS conformity scheme: an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) for imports or a PS Certification Mark for local manufacture, supported by test reports from a BPS-recognised (ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025) laboratory. The rating plate and product markings must follow PNS IEC 60598 and Philippine requirements, and a valid ICC conditions customs release.
summary.zh: 投放菲律宾市场且受照明技术法规涵盖的 LED 灯具，须依据将 IEC 60598 采用为菲律宾国家标准（PNS IEC 60598-1 一般要求与试验，及该灯具类型相关的第 2 部分章节）证明电气安全。核心要求涵盖防触电、绝缘及介电强度、爬电距离和电气间隙、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子——按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电评估。安全性在 BPS 合格评定方案内证明：进口取得进口商品清关（ICC），本地制造取得 PS 认证标志，由 BPS 认可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）实验室出具的检测报告支持。铭牌及产品标识须遵循 PNS IEC 60598 及菲律宾要求，有效 ICC 是海关放行的条件。
summary.zht: 投放菲律賓市場且受照明技術法規涵蓋的 LED 燈具，須依據將 IEC 60598 採用為菲律賓國家標準（PNS IEC 60598-1 一般要求與試驗，及該燈具類型相關的第 2 部分章節）證明電氣安全。核心要求涵蓋防觸電、絕緣及介電強度、爬電距離和電氣間隙、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子——按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電評估。安全性在 BPS 合格評定方案內證明：進口取得進口商品清關（ICC），本地製造取得 PS 認證標誌，由 BPS 認可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）實驗室出具的檢測報告支持。銘牌及產品標識須遵循 PNS IEC 60598 及菲律賓要求，有效 ICC 是海關放行的條件。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (as adopted by BPS), with applicable Part 2 sections
BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) / Philippine Standard (PS) Certification Mark — lighting technical regulation

summary.en: China's general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), which replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026 and changes the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T; CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules. CCC testing is by CNCA-authorised laboratories at the China 220 V 50 Hz supply. Both PNS IEC 60598 and GB/T 7000.1 share the IEC 60598 base, but the conformity process, supply reference (230 V 60 Hz vs 220 V 50 Hz), documentation, and clearance are separate from the Philippine BPS scheme.
summary.zh: 中国通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，并将属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T；范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室在中国 220 V 50 Hz 供电下进行。PNS IEC 60598 与 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598 为基础，但合格评定流程、供电基准（230 V 60 Hz 与 220 V 50 Hz）、文件及清关均与菲律宾 BPS 方案相互独立。
summary.zht: 中國通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015，並將屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T；範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室在中國 220 V 50 Hz 供電下進行。PNS IEC 60598 與 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598 為基礎，但合格評定流程、供電基準（230 V 60 Hz 與 220 V 50 Hz）、文件及清關均與菲律賓 BPS 方案相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: PNS IEC 60598 and GB/T 7000.1 share the IEC 60598 technical base, so much of the safety evaluation overlaps, but the gaps are procedural and supply-related: (1) safety must be demonstrated for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply, not the China 220 V 50 Hz basis, and creepage/clearance and dielectric assumptions should be confirmed at the higher nominal voltage; (2) the test report must support the BPS ICC / PS file from a BPS-recognised laboratory — a China CCC report under GB/T 7000.1 is not automatically accepted; (3) the clearance must be held by a Philippine in-country importer (ICC) or local manufacturer (PS); (4) rating-plate markings and instructions must meet PNS IEC 60598 and Philippine expectations. Existing China test data may shorten testing but cannot be directly reused for the Philippine clearance.
gap.zh: PNS IEC 60598 与 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598 为技术基础，安全评估大部分重叠，但差距在于程序及供电：（1）安全须按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电而非中国 220 V 50 Hz 基准证明，爬电距离/电气间隙及介电假设应按更高标称电压确认；（2）检测报告须由 BPS 认可实验室出具以支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件——中国 GB/T 7000.1 下的 CCC 报告不会被自动接受；（3）清关须由菲律宾本地进口商（ICC）或本地制造商（PS）持有；（4）铭牌标识及说明须满足 PNS IEC 60598 及菲律宾要求。现有中国检测数据可缩短检测，但不可直接用于菲律宾清关。
gap.zht: PNS IEC 60598 與 GB/T 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598 為技術基礎，安全評估大部分重疊，但差距在於程序及供電：（1）安全須按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電而非中國 220 V 50 Hz 基準證明，爬電距離/電氣間隙及介電假設應按更高標稱電壓確認；（2）檢測報告須由 BPS 認可實驗室出具以支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件——中國 GB/T 7000.1 下的 CCC 報告不會被自動接受；（3）清關須由菲律賓本地進口商（ICC）或本地製造商（PS）持有；（4）銘牌標識及說明須滿足 PNS IEC 60598 及菲律賓要求。現有中國檢測數據可縮短檢測，但不可直接用於菲律賓清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to PNS IEC 60598 required within the BPS ICC / PS scheme before customs release / sale of covered luminaires; evaluated at 230 V 60 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory within CNCA-C10-01 scope; general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026 (evaluated at 220 V 50 Hz)

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for LED luminaires in the Philippines is demonstrated to PNS IEC 60598 within the BPS ICC / PS scheme and evaluated for the 230 V 60 Hz supply. The technical base overlaps with China GB/T 7000.1 (both IEC 60598-derived), but a China CCC report is not automatically accepted, the supply reference differs (230 V 60 Hz vs 220 V 50 Hz), and the clearance must be held by a Philippine in-country importer (ICC) or local manufacturer (PS). Test to PNS IEC 60598 at a BPS-recognised laboratory and confirm creepage/clearance at the higher nominal voltage before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾 LED 灯具的电气安全依据 PNS IEC 60598 在 BPS ICC / PS 方案内证明，并按 230 V 60 Hz 供电评估。技术基础与中国 GB/T 7000.1（均源自 IEC 60598）重叠，但中国 CCC 报告不会被自动接受，供电基准不同（230 V 60 Hz 与 220 V 50 Hz），且清关须由菲律宾本地进口商（ICC）或本地制造商（PS）持有。进入市场前，请在 BPS 认可实验室按 PNS IEC 60598 检测，并按更高标称电压确认爬电距离/电气间隙。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓 LED 燈具的電氣安全依據 PNS IEC 60598 在 BPS ICC / PS 方案內證明，並按 230 V 60 Hz 供電評估。技術基礎與中國 GB/T 7000.1（均源自 IEC 60598）重疊，但中國 CCC 報告不會被自動接受，供電基準不同（230 V 60 Hz 與 220 V 50 Hz），且清關須由菲律賓本地進口商（ICC）或本地製造商（PS）持有。進入市場前，請在 BPS 認可實驗室按 PNS IEC 60598 檢測，並按更高標稱電壓確認爬電距離/電氣間隙。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp / Driver Safety (PNS IEC 62560 + control gear)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯 / 驱动器安全（PNS IEC 62560 + 控制装置）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈 / 驅動器安全（PNS IEC 62560 + 控制裝置）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (the screw/bayonet retrofit LED bulbs) placed on the Philippine market must demonstrate safety to the Philippine National Standard adoption of IEC 62560 (PNS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications). Requirements cover marking, interchangeability, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, mechanical strength, fault conditions, and thermal/resistance to heat and fire — evaluated at the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply. For luminaires with separate LED drivers/control gear, the control-gear safety is assessed to the applicable IEC 61347 series (as adopted) as part of the technical file. Safety evidence supports the BPS ICC (imports) or PS mark (local manufacture), with test reports from a BPS-recognised (ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025) laboratory.
summary.zh: 投放菲律宾市场的通用照明自镇流 LED 灯（螺口/卡口替换式 LED 灯泡）须依据将 IEC 62560 采用为菲律宾国家标准（PNS IEC 62560——供电电压大于 50 V 的通用照明自镇流 LED 灯安全规范）证明安全性。要求涵盖标识、互换性、防触电、绝缘电阻及介电强度、机械强度、故障条件及耐热耐火——按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电评估。对于含独立 LED 驱动器/控制装置的灯具，控制装置安全按适用的 IEC 61347 系列（如采用）作为技术文件的组成部分评估。安全证据支持 BPS ICC（进口）或 PS 标志（本地制造），检测报告须来自 BPS 认可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）实验室。
summary.zht: 投放菲律賓市場的通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈（螺口/卡口替換式 LED 燈泡）須依據將 IEC 62560 採用為菲律賓國家標準（PNS IEC 62560——供電電壓大於 50 V 的通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈安全規範）證明安全性。要求涵蓋標識、互換性、防觸電、絕緣電阻及介電強度、機械強度、故障條件及耐熱耐火——按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電評估。對於含獨立 LED 驅動器/控制裝置的燈具，控制裝置安全按適用的 IEC 61347 系列（如採用）作為技術文件的組成部分評估。安全證據支持 BPS ICC（進口）或 PS 標誌（本地製造），檢測報告須來自 BPS 認可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）實驗室。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications (as adopted by BPS)
IEC 61347 series (e.g. IEC 61347-2-13) — Lamp control gear safety for LED modules (as adopted, for separate drivers / control gear)

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB/T 24906 / GB 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications, aligned with IEC 62560) for retrofit LED bulbs, and GB 19510.14-2014 (control gear for LED modules, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13) for LED drivers. CCC may apply to certain self-ballasted lamps and drivers in defined ranges, tested at CNCA-authorised laboratories at the China 220 V 50 Hz supply. The Chinese GB-based reports are not automatically accepted in the Philippine BPS conformity scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 24906 / GB 24906（供电电压大于 50 V 的通用照明自镇流 LED 灯安全规范，与 IEC 62560 对齐）用于替换式 LED 灯泡，以及 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模块控制装置，与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐）用于 LED 驱动器。特定范围内的部分自镇流灯及驱动器可能适用 CCC，在 CNCA 授权实验室按中国 220 V 50 Hz 供电检测。中国基于 GB 的报告不会被菲律宾 BPS 合格评定方案自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 24906 / GB 24906（供電電壓大於 50 V 的通用照明自鎮流 LED 燈安全規範，與 IEC 62560 對齊）用於替換式 LED 燈泡，以及 GB 19510.14-2014（LED 模塊控制裝置，與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊）用於 LED 驅動器。特定範圍內的部分自鎮流燈及驅動器可能適用 CCC，在 CNCA 授權實驗室按中國 220 V 50 Hz 供電檢測。中國基於 GB 的報告不會被菲律賓 BPS 合格評定方案自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24906 / GB 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications (China, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules (China, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)

gap.en: PNS IEC 62560 and the Chinese GB 24906 share the IEC 62560 base (as do the control-gear standards via IEC 61347-2-13), so the technical evaluation largely overlaps, but the gaps are procedural and supply-related: (1) safety must be shown for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply, not 220 V 50 Hz — insulation, dielectric, and thermal assumptions should be confirmed at the higher nominal voltage; (2) the test report must support the BPS ICC / PS file from a BPS-recognised laboratory — China CCC reports are not automatically accepted; (3) where a luminaire uses a separate driver, both the lamp/luminaire and the control gear must be covered in the technical file; (4) markings and instructions must meet the Philippine requirements. As with the general luminaire case, China test data may reduce re-testing scope but cannot be directly transferred to the Philippine clearance.
gap.zh: PNS IEC 62560 与中国 GB 24906 同以 IEC 62560 为基础（控制装置标准亦经 IEC 61347-2-13），技术评估大部分重叠，但差距在于程序及供电：（1）安全须按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电而非 220 V 50 Hz 证明——绝缘、介电及热假设应按更高标称电压确认；（2）检测报告须由 BPS 认可实验室出具以支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件——中国 CCC 报告不会被自动接受；（3）当灯具采用独立驱动器时，灯/灯具及控制装置均须在技术文件中涵盖；（4）标识及说明须满足菲律宾要求。与通用灯具情形相同，中国检测数据可减少重新检测范围，但不可直接转用于菲律宾清关。
gap.zht: PNS IEC 62560 與中國 GB 24906 同以 IEC 62560 為基礎（控制裝置標準亦經 IEC 61347-2-13），技術評估大部分重疊，但差距在於程序及供電：（1）安全須按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電而非 220 V 50 Hz 證明——絕緣、介電及熱假設應按更高標稱電壓確認；（2）檢測報告須由 BPS 認可實驗室出具以支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件——中國 CCC 報告不會被自動接受；（3）當燈具採用獨立驅動器時，燈/燈具及控制裝置均須在技術文件中涵蓋；（4）標識及說明須滿足菲律賓要求。與通用燈具情形相同，中國檢測數據可減少重新檢測範圍，但不可直接轉用於菲律賓清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamp safety to PNS IEC 62560 (and control-gear safety to the applicable IEC 61347 series) required within the BPS ICC / PS scheme; evaluated at 230 V 60 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in scope — GB 24906 (self-ballasted lamps) and GB 19510.14 (LED control gear) apply; CCC may be required for defined lamp/driver ranges (evaluated at 220 V 50 Hz)

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for the Philippine market must demonstrate safety to PNS IEC 62560 (with separate drivers assessed to the applicable IEC 61347 series) within the BPS ICC / PS scheme, evaluated at 230 V 60 Hz. The base overlaps with China GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 (both IEC-derived), but China CCC reports are not automatically accepted, the supply reference differs, and the clearance must be held by a Philippine in-country importer (ICC) or local manufacturer (PS). Confirm insulation, dielectric, and thermal performance at the higher nominal voltage and test at a BPS-recognised laboratory before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向菲律宾市场的自镇流 LED 灯须依据 PNS IEC 62560 在 BPS ICC / PS 方案内证明安全性（独立驱动器按适用的 IEC 61347 系列评估），并按 230 V 60 Hz 评估。其基础与中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14（均源自 IEC）重叠，但中国 CCC 报告不会被自动接受，供电基准不同，且清关须由菲律宾本地进口商（ICC）或本地制造商（PS）持有。进入市场前，请按更高标称电压确认绝缘、介电及热性能，并在 BPS 认可实验室检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向菲律賓市場的自鎮流 LED 燈須依據 PNS IEC 62560 在 BPS ICC / PS 方案內證明安全性（獨立驅動器按適用的 IEC 61347 系列評估），並按 230 V 60 Hz 評估。其基礎與中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14（均源自 IEC）重疊，但中國 CCC 報告不會被自動接受，供電基準不同，且清關須由菲律賓本地進口商（ICC）或本地製造商（PS）持有。進入市場前，請按更高標稱電壓確認絕緣、介電及熱性能，並在 BPS 認可實驗室檢測。
